query: SELECT ticker, userId, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM userAssets WHERE archived = 0 GROUP BY ticker, userId HAVING cnt > 1 ORDER BY cnt DESC LIMIT 10;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2fRMU9WuDe4UzGh.6d94b4c6929d --database MmWmJbH77mYYXTZazVYpbM --execute SELECT ticker, userId, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM userAssets WHERE archived = 0 GROUP BY ticker, userId HAVING cnt > 1 ORDER BY cnt DESC LIMIT 10;
